title: AS400 Release Manager, Banking (1-year renewable contract)
description:
Dear Applicant,

If you or someone you know is interested, please send the CV to VeronicaE@evolutionjobs.sg (preferred, as I may overlook some CVs due to the high volume).

Please note that visa sponsorship is not available at this time.

JD

Education:

·         Diploma / Degree in Computer Science or related field.

·        At least 3 years’ relevant experience preferably in a Finance Institution.

Essential:

·        Basic Technical knowledge in IT infrastructure, IT Change Management & Operations and OS400 systems is required

·        Process-oriented, strong analytical and communication skills

·        A team player with the ability in coordinating activities both within the team and across other teams

·        You are expected to ensure your work are adequately documented before executing in any environment.

·        Required to perform shift duties including weekend and public holidays where required.

  1. Knowledge of Change Control and Version Control and Deployment tools – Remedy Change Module, Endevor , Rocket RDOe and RDOi , ARCAD
  2. Familiarity with supporting OCP platform and usage of DevOps Toolset  (Bitbucket , Jenkins & Jira workflows) will be an added advantage .
  3. Basic CLP & RPG coding on the OS400 platform and scripting on linux operating system will be an added advantage
  4. Proficient in Microsoft Excel

postedCompany.description:
Evolution Recruitment Solutions are an award winning, specialist IT and Digital recruitment consultancy with offices in Singapore, Sydney, UK, Germany and US. Formed in 2000 we have helped thousands of IT and Digital professionals secure their next Permanent, Contract or Interim position with companies ranging from SME to multinationals. Our professional and quality driven approach has led to Evolution being regularly recommended to others.  

Evolution have received a number of awards in recognition of the outstanding training, development and support we provide to our consultants which in turn results in a higher level of service for both applicants and clients:   


Investors In People - Gold  

2nd place The Sunday Times - 100 Best Small Companies to work for 

Best Companies - 3 Stars for Extraordinary Workforce Engagement  

Jobsite 'Best Industry Knowledge'​ Award  

Global Recruiter Asia Pacific Awards:  

- Best in-house training - Best Newcomer 

- APSCo Asia Member of the Year 

- Best Specialist Recruitment Business  

- Best Small Recruitment Business
